objective: Improve support-ticket routing for refund, account lockout, and mixed-intent cases.
constraints: Preserve route, confidence, and reason fields.
Use needs_review for ambiguous or mixed-intent input.
Do not edit source files during the run.

exposure_notes.train: Visible to optimizer for diagnosis and candidate design.
exposure_notes.final_review: Not used for candidate steering in this example.

baseline.context_reconstruction_assessment: sufficient to faithfully replay the LLM-call context for this routing prompt example
fidelity_gaps: real application runtime path was not executed; full app integration behavior still needs validation

rejected_hypotheses: Route descriptions alone are enough to fix mixed-intent fallback.
open_risks: Final-review case should be run before applying the prompt.
search_policy: Use bounded prompt patches targeted at observed failures; prefer simpler equivalent prompts.
prompt_cost_preference: Treat prompt growth as a cost, not a failure.
stop_condition: Stop after two candidate steps or when acceptance criteria are met without regressions.
